payload.text:
Available image hosts:

**Catbox**
Anonymous upload, no account needed. Direct links.
Max size: 200 MB
Expiry: Permanent
Direct links: Yes

**Imgur**
Popular host, public gallery. Direct links.
Max size: 20 MB
Expiry: Permanent (anonymous)
Direct links: Yes

**0x0.st**
Minimalist host. Direct links, auto-expires.
Max size: 512 MB
Expiry: 14 days or 100 downloads
Direct links: Yes

**file.io**
Ephemeral links. Self-destructs after first download.
Max size: 2 GB
Expiry: 14 days or 1 download
Direct links: No (view page)

name: hosts menu button shows the same host list
